content.full_text:
California Fair Political Practices Commission

April 17, 1990

Larry Lopez  
Building Industry Assn. PAC  
1571 Beverly Blvd.  
Los Angeles, CA 90026

Re: Your Request For Advice  
Our File No. A-90-242

Dear Mr. Lopez:

You have requested written confirmation of telephone advice provided to you under the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act (the "Act").1/

Your letter, dated March 14, 1990, correctly summarizes my advice concerning the appropriate method of recordkeeping and reporting campaign contributions to the Building Industry Association Political Action Committee.

If you have any questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5662.

Sincerely,

Kathryn E. Donovan  
General Counsel

Alice Hughes  
Political Reform Consultant  
Technical Assistance and Analysis Division

1/ Government Code Sections 81000-91015. All statutory references are to the Government Code unless otherwise indicated. Commission regulations appear at 2 California Code of Regulations Section 18000, et seq. All references to regulations are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations.
